name: Cedric
tagline: Web & Mobile Developer | CS Student | React · Next.js · React Native
about: Computer Science student at New Era University with hands-on experience in full-stack web development. Passionate about building practical, user-focused applications using modern frameworks. Complemented by growing expertise in data science and machine learning.

experience.title: Quality Assurance and Documentation Intern
experience.description: Performed quality assurance and documentation tasks for Xamun AI, an AI-powered product under BlastAsia Inc.

experience.title: Full-stack Developer
experience.description: A comprehensive pickleball court reservation system developed using React 18, TypeScript, and Vite, with Supabase serving as the backend for authentication, PostgreSQL database management, and file storage. Includes dynamic pricing, equipment rental, admin controls, Google Sheets integration, and automated email confirmations via Supabase Edge Functions.

projects.name: NEU-OJT-APP
projects.description: A cross-platform mobile application for NEU students undergoing On-the-Job Training (OJT), enabling students to manage requirements and track logged training hours.

projects.name: EventEra: Events Management Hub
projects.description: A centralized events management platform streamlining scheduling, registration, and coordination tasks to improve event organization and participant engagement.

projects.name: NEUnited: Student Organization Management Website
projects.description: A web-based system for managing student organizations, featuring membership tracking, activity logging, and resource management to enhance collaboration and transparency.

projects.name: Match Point Racket Club Reservation Website
projects.description: A web-based reservation system to manage pickleball court bookings. Integrated the Google Sheets API for syncing reservations with administrative records and the Resend API for automated email confirmations.

projects.name: Converso: LMS SaaS App
projects.description: A Learning Management System (LMS) SaaS platform enabling real-time teaching and interactive learning experiences. Integrated Vapi to deliver live voice-enabled sessions and an AI-powered vocal agent to enhance engagement.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
